segments.text: Praise the Lord.
Blessed is the man who fears the Lord, who greatly delights in his commandments!
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: His offspring will be mighty in the land;
the generation of the upright will be blessed.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Wealth and riches are in his house,
and his righteousness endures forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: Light dawns in the darkness for the upright;
he is gracious, merciful, and righteous.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: It is well with a man who deals generously and lends;
who conducts his affairs with discretion.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: For the righteous will never be moved;
he will be remembered forever.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He is not afraid of bad news;
his heart is firm, trusting in the Lord.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: His heart is steady;
he will not be afraid, until he looks in triumph on his adversaries.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: He has distributed freely;
he has given to the poor; his righteousness endures forever; his horn is exalted with honor.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: The wicked man sees it and is angry;
he gnashes his teeth and melts away; the desire of the wicked will perish.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
